title: As soon as man is born he begins to die.
Speak of the devil and he will appear.
Two heads are better than one.
A friend in need is a friend indeed.
Seeing is believing.
He who laughs last, laughs best.
The darkest hour is just before the dawn.
Dead men tell no tales.
Life is what you make it.
Today is a good day to die.
No pain, no gain.
You can't make an omelet without breaking eggs.
Tomorrow is another day.
Revenge is a dish best served cold.
overview: Just after the second division battle ends, a string of ordinary citizens go on the rampage. On top of that, there's a hostage situation at a hotel in Ikebukuro. The objective: revenge against the Buster Bros!!! Ichiro, Jiro, and Saburo dash to the scene!

title: Side with the weak and crush the strong.
overview: The Katen-gumi is attacked. When Samatoki Aohitsugi, Jyuto Iruma, and Rio Mason Busujima arrive to help, they meet self-proclaimed "legendary gambler" Chuji Furoito. Meanwhile, MAD TRIGGER CREW has its hands full with the civilian rampages.

title: Happiness depends upon ourselves.
overview: Samatoki recognizes TBH's dancers. Bad things will happen if they aren't stopped, so MAD TRIGGER CREW joins forces with Ichiro Yamada, Ramuda Amemura, and Jakurai Jinguji. Elsewhere, bad things are happening around Nagoya Division's Bad Ass Temple.

title: There is little success where there is little laughter.
overview: A huge man named Ondoriya challenges Sasara Nurude, Rosho Tsutsujimori, and Rei Amayado—Osaka Division's Dotsuitare Honpo—to a rap battle. An accident during the battle causes Ondoriya to lose his memory. Sasara and Rosho try to help him get it back!

title: As soon as you trust yourself, you will know how to live.
overview: Jakurai goes to Nagoya to look for clues about TBH and runs into Hifumi and Doppo. Hifumi is working at the Nagoya branch of the host club. When they hear that club patrons have info on TBH, Jakurai, Ichiro, Kuko, and the others go help out at the club.

title: Friendship is a single soul dwelling in three bodies.
overview: MAD TRIGGER CREW and Fling Posse learn that there are clues about TBH in Osaka. They ask Dotsuitare Honpo for help and start gathering information. A crew of three imitating Fling Posse appears. Something about seeing a copy of himself irritates Ramuda.

title: Hell is empty and all the devils are here.
overview: Ichiro and the others head to Osaka Bay to dismantle the bombs at the theme park where TBH announced they're holding an Underground Division Rap Battle.

title: Each of us bears his own Hell.
overview: MAD TRIGGER CREW and Dotsuitare Honpo arrive in a new area and fall into TBH's trap; the two teams are shown footage of Samatoki's younger sister, Rosho's student and Rio's former commanding officer -- only one can be saved.

title: The North Wind and the Sun.
overview: TBH dancers Kiaro and Skuro appear before Ichiro and Kuko. Ichiro says that he's sure they're people he used to know, but the dancers don't remember it. Meanwhile, when Matenro and Fling Posse arrive in their arena, they're ambushed by assassins.

title: Every new beginning comes from some other beginning's end.
overview: TBH appears again before Ichiro and the others. They say that if they're beaten in a rap battle, they'll spill everything they know. Ichiro, Samatoki, Ramuda, Jakurai, Kuko, and Sasara accept the challenge. After the battle, the mastermind is revealed.

title: There are no goodbyes for us. Wherever you are, you will always be in my heart.
overview: Everyone who fell into Kaibyakumon's trap divide into groups and head out via three helicopters. Ichiro and the others agree to help suppress the rioters in Tokyo. The six members in the third helicopter head to Shibuya to confront Chiaro.

title: Tears come from the heart and not from the brain.
overview: The six leaders arrive in Chuuoku where the special forces have started rioting due to the influence of Kaibyakumon's drones. The second helicopter lands in Shinjuku where they start looking for the drones' control server, but they fall into Scuro's trap.

title: Where there's hope, there's life. It fills us with fresh courage and makes us strong again.
overview: The six leaders head to the former site of Beginning Gate where they find Kaibyakumon waiting for them. Kaibyakumon transforms into a monster using hundreds of drones and overwhelms the six leaders with a rap overflowing with rage and despair.
